# SOAR CNC — SOAR Global Enterprise Co., Ltd

> High-precision CNC machining manufacturer based in Taichung, Taiwan. SOAR CNC provides CNC turning, milling and turn-mill (mill-turn) machining of tight-tolerance custom metal parts for OEM and export-oriented projects, plus turnkey finishing and a process-oriented quality system. The focus is precision, process stability and long-term cooperation — not low-cost mass production.

## Company
- Legal name: SOAR Global Enterprise Co., Ltd (Taiwan VAT / company registration No. 60345849)
- Brand: SOAR CNC
- Location: Taichung, Taiwan — a center of high-end CNC machining and machine-tool manufacturing
- Languages: English and 繁體中文 (Traditional Chinese)
- Email: info@soartaiwan.com
- Website: https://soartaiwan.com/

## Services
- CNC Turning — precision rotational components and shafts
- CNC Milling — multi-axis machining of complex geometries and custom metal parts
- Turn-Mill / Mill-Turn — combined turning and milling in a single setup
- Tight-tolerance machining of functional metal parts
- Prototype to small and mid-volume OEM and contract manufacturing
- Design for Manufacturing (DFM) support and end-to-end manufacturing management

## Machining capabilities (specifications)
- CNC turning bar diameter: Ø3.0 mm to Ø80.0 mm
- Maximum turning length: 500 mm
- Milling travel (X·Y·Z): up to 1000 × 500 × 500 mm
- Achievable tolerance: metals to ±0.02 mm (0.0008"); engineering plastics to ±0.05 mm (0.002")
- Machine fleet: 90+ CNC machines across turning, sliding-head, turn-mill and machining centres; brands include TAKAMAZ, TSUGAMI, Miyano, DMG, Nakamura-Tome, AMADA, AWEA, FFG and FANUC
- Metrology: CMM (coordinate measuring machine) and optical projector

## Materials
- Metals: aluminium, stainless steel, carbon steel, titanium, brass, copper
- Engineering plastics: POM (Delrin), PEEK, PTFE, nylon

## Value-added / turnkey services
- Surface finishing: anodizing, plating, sandblasting, powder coating
- Heat treatment: hardening, tempering
- Finishing and assembly: precision grinding, laser engraving, light assembly

## Quality & compliance
- Quality is embedded across the workflow, not treated as a final inspection step
- Structured review of drawings, tolerances and specifications before production
- Dimensional inspection with calibrated metrology: ZEISS SPECTRUM and Hexagon CMMs, SPARK coordinate-measuring machines, 2.5D / VIEWLEAD / Baty optical and profile projectors, Mitutoyo SJ-400 surface-roughness and linear-height gauges, hardness testers, and CCD vision systems
- Inspection records and full batch traceability aligned to customer requirements
- Certifications: ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, TTQS

## Industries served
- Aerospace and defense-oriented supply chains
- Semiconductor
- Medical and healthcare
- Industrial equipment and automation
- High-performance cycling
- Automotive, HVAC & appliance, and electronics

## Requesting a quote
Contact info@soartaiwan.com or use https://soartaiwan.com/contact.html. To receive an accurate quotation, include:
- Technical drawings (PDF and/or STEP files)
- Material specifications
- Required tolerances and critical features
- Target quantities and estimated annual volume
- Application or industry (industrial, aerospace, defense-oriented, etc.)
- Required delivery timeline
